accessibility_note: Min 44px touch target independent of radius

Border radius should not clip close button or content
Text inside pill shapes needs extra horizontal padding
Ring provides separation from background for low-contrast images
Arrow element must align with border radius
Ensure 3:1 contrast for decorative separators that convey grouping

use_case: Table cell borders and grid lines
accessibility_note: Header cells use slightly thicker bottom border for hierarchy
Off state border must have sufficient contrast without relying on color
Match target component radius for seamless transition
